94ed5f5e7835.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
94ed5f5e7835.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
94ed5f5e7835.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

d51d57c4d74a.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
d51d57c4d74a.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
d51d57c4d74a.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

5b9fff1893fc.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5b9fff1893fc.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

4a64341bae9e.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
4a64341bae9e.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
4a64341bae9e.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

0aaca2f6b1cd.title: Ranked #5 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
0aaca2f6b1cd.description: At percentile 20.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

55a429368ea5.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
55a429368ea5.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

27713eb456ef.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
27713eb456ef.description: You trail peers by 1.2 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
